title: 2019年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検準2級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを、放送される1, 2, 3の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I heard that you're writing a book, Howard.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. It's an adventure story. I'm almost finished with it.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Wow, that's great! What are you going to call it?

choices: My book came out last month.
I've always wanted to be a writer.
I haven't thought of a name yet.
questions.explanation: タイトルを聞かれ、まだ名前を考えていないと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: What are you going to call it?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「先月出版」→まだ完成前。選択肢2「作家になりたかった」→タイトルの話。選択肢3「まだ名前を考えていない」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello. Could you help me find some medicine?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Certainly, sir. What seems to be the problem?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Well, I have a sore throat and a bad cough.

choices: Sure. Come back when you're feeling better.
OK. I know just the right kind for you.
Hmm. I don't have a cough.
questions.explanation: 喉の痛みと咳の症状を聞いて、適切な薬を知っていると答えるのが適切です。
highlights: a sore throat and a bad cough
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「良くなったら来て」→薬を買いたい。選択肢2「ちょうどいいものがある」→正解。選択肢3「咳はない」→客の症状。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Ciao, Karen. That means "hello" in Italian.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Well, ciao to you, too. Are you studying Italian?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. I'm learning some words and phrases. I'm taking a vacation in Italy next month.

choices: Great. I'm glad you had a good time.
No. I'm trying to save my money.
Wow. I've always wanted to go there.
questions.explanation: 来月イタリアに行くと聞いて、ずっと行きたかったと答えるのが自然です。
highlights: I'm taking a vacation in Italy next month
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「楽しかったようで」→まだ行ってない。選択肢2「お金を貯めている」→相手の話。選択肢3「ずっと行きたかった」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Julie, hurry up. We're going to be late for your dance lesson.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I know, Dad, but I can't find my dance shoes.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I put them in your bag for you.

choices: Oh, thanks. I'm ready to go, then.
Yes, but I don't have my shoes.
Well, I just got them last month.
questions.explanation: バッグに入れておいたと言われ、ありがとう準備できたと答えるのが自然です。
highlights: I put them in your bag for you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「ありがとう、準備できた」→正解。選択肢2「靴がない」→もう入れた。選択肢3「先月買った」→見つかった。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, honey, I'm home.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi. What took you so long? Did you have to work late again?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, but traffic was really bad.

choices: Well, I hope you finished making dinner.
Well, please call and tell me next time.
Well, I got the car repaired.
questions.explanation: 渋滞で遅くなったと聞いて、次は電話してと頼むのが自然です。
highlights: traffic was really bad
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「夕食作って」→遅くなった理由の返答。選択肢2「次は電話して」→正解。選択肢3「車を修理した」→渋滞の話。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Welcome to the Silverton Zoo. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'd like to see the lions. Where are they?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sorry, but the lion house is closed for repairs. It'll be open again next week.

choices: Well, I guess I'll come back then.
Well, I thought you still had tickets.
questions.explanation: 来週また開くと言われ、また来ると答えるのが自然です。
highlights: It'll be open again next week
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「高すぎる」→修理中。選択肢2「また来る」→正解。選択肢3「チケットがあると思った」→修理中。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Welcome to Diego's Bar and Grill.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello. I made a reservation for tonight at eight. I'm Jessica Palmer.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm sorry, Ms. Palmer, but you're a little early. Your table isn't ready yet.

choices: That's OK. I don't mind waiting.
That's fine. I should have made a reservation.
questions.explanation: まだテーブルの準備ができていないと言われ、待つのは構わないと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: you're a little early
Your table isn't ready yet
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「待っても構わない」→正解。選択肢2「お腹が空いた」→まだ準備中。選択肢3「予約すべきだった」→もう予約済み。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello. This is Fred James, Cindy's teacher. Cindy's not feeling well. Could you come and take her home?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no. I'll be there right away. Where should I pick her up?

choices: She has a lot of homework to do.
She seems to be feeling better.
She'll be in the nurse's office.
questions.explanation: どこに迎えに行けばいいか聞かれ、保健室にいると答えるのが適切です。
highlights: Where should I pick her up?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「宿題がたくさん」→迎えの場所。選択肢2「元気になった」→具合が悪い。選択肢3「保健室にいる」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: David, I need a favor.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Certainly, Ms. Johnson, what can I do?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Please help me with my sales presentation. Can you make 10 copies of these documents and bring them to my office?

choices: Well, I've already finished my presentation.
Of course. I'll get started now.
No, I don't have an office.
questions.explanation: コピーを頼まれ、すぐ始めると答えるのが適切です。
highlights: Can you make 10 copies
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「もうプレゼン終わった」→頼まれた仕事。選択肢2「すぐ始める」→正解。選択肢3「オフィスがない」→彼女のオフィス。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello. This is Becky Davis. Is Jimmy home?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Becky. He's here, but he's sleeping. Can I take a message?

choices: No, I can talk to him tomorrow at school.
questions.explanation: 伝言を預かろうかと言われ、明日学校で話せるから大丈夫と答えるのが適切です。
highlights: Can I take a message?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「すぐ起きる」→Beckyの返答。選択肢2「今忙しい」→電話をかけた側。選択肢3「明日学校で話す」→正解。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. Do you know if there is a bus from the airport to the Yorktown Hotel?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sorry, I don't. I don't work here. Why don't you ask at the airport information desk?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I want to, but I can't find it.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's over there by that entrance.

questions.question: What does the man suggest the woman do?
choices: Take a taxi to the hotel.
questions.explanation: 空港のインフォメーションデスクで聞くことを勧めています。
highlights: Why don't you ask at the airport information desk?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「タクシー」→案内所。選択肢2「ホテルに電話」→案内所。選択肢3「案内所で聞く」→正解。選択肢4「次のバスを待つ」→案内所。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Judy, did you clean up your room?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Not yet, Dad. I'm still doing my homework.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Well, make sure you clean it up before dinner. It'll be ready in an hour.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: All right.

questions.question: What does Judy's father tell her to do?
questions.explanation: 夕食前に部屋を片付けるように言っています。
highlights: make sure you clean it up before dinner
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「宿題を先に」→部屋の掃除。選択肢2「料理を手伝う」→掃除。選択肢3「早く寝る」→掃除。選択肢4「夕食前に掃除」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Waiter, this food is really good. The salad is amazing.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thank you. We use only the freshest vegetables in our salads. And the salad dressing is made using the chef's special recipe.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Well, it's delicious. Can you tell me what it's made with?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sorry, ma'am, I can't. The recipe is a secret. Not even the waiters know what's in it.

questions.question: What is one thing the waiter tells the woman about the salad dressing?
choices: It was made by the woman herself.
questions.explanation: ドレッシングのレシピは秘密でウェイターも知りません。
highlights: The recipe is a secret
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「輸入野菜」→レシピが秘密。選択肢2「店で売っている」→秘密。選択肢3「女性が作った」→シェフのレシピ。選択肢4「レシピは秘密」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Honey, remember the writing contest I entered?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. Didn't you write a story about a boy traveling around the world with his dog?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I did. And guess what! I won first prize! The prize is a trip to Italy for two! Doesn't that sound great?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Wow! Congratulations, that's great news! And Italy—I've heard it's a beautiful country.

questions.question: How did the woman win a prize?
questions.explanation: ライティングコンテストに優勝しました。
highlights: the writing contest I entered
I won first prize
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「料理コンテスト」→ライティング。選択肢2「宝くじ」→コンテスト。選択肢3「ライティングコンテスト」→正解。選択肢4「クイズ番組」→コンテスト。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello. I'd like two tickets for next Friday's showing of the play Rain on the Mountain.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Will that be for the early or the late show?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: The late show. And could I get seats in the back row? I've heard that the seats are more comfortable and have a better view.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Certainly, sir. That's what a lot of our customers say.

questions.question: Why does the man want to sit in the back row?
questions.explanation: 後ろの席の方が快適で見晴らしが良いと聞いたからです。
highlights: the seats are more comfortable and have a better view
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「安い」→快適。選択肢2「座席が快適」→正解。選択肢3「早く出られる」→快適。選択肢4「友達がいる」→快適。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Joanne. Have you talked to the French exchange student yet?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. But I saw you talking to her at lunch, Carl.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. She's really friendly. She told me a lot about her country.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll talk to her tomorrow. I'm really interested in France.

questions.question: What does Joanne say she will do tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 明日フランスからの留学生と話すと言っています。
highlights: I'll talk to her tomorrow
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「フランス訪問」→話す。選択肢2「フランス語勉強」→留学生と話す。選択肢3「留学生と話す」→正解。選択肢4「Carlとランチ」→留学生。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hey, Greg, the drama club meeting is at six o'clock tonight, right?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. Mr. Kay is going to announce the new play we're going to do, so I'm excited about that.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Right. And I heard two new members are coming tonight, too.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh, really? I didn't know that.

questions.question: What does the boy say he is excited about?
questions.explanation: 新しい劇の発表があることにワクワクしています。
highlights: Mr. Kay is going to announce the new play
I'm excited about that
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「新しい劇の発表」→正解。選択肢2「新メンバー」→知らなかった。選択肢3「演劇部に入る」→すでにメンバー。選択肢4「劇に出る」→発表を聞く。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good afternoon. Super Foods Supermarket.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello. I'd like to know if your store is looking for part-time workers.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, we are. Please come in and pick up a job-application form.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great. I'll come in today.

questions.question: Why will the man go to the store today?
questions.explanation: アルバイトの応募用紙を取りに行きます。
highlights: pick up a job-application form
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「食料品を買う」→応募用紙。選択肢2「応募用紙を取りに」→正解。選択肢3「返品」→応募。選択肢4「友人に会う」→応募。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Mr. Edwards, I'm going to be in an English speech contest, and I need to practice. Could you please listen to my speech?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Of course, Kaori. Just come to my office tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thank you. Will you be there around four o'clock?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. I'll be waiting for you then.

questions.question: What does Kaori want Mr. Edwards to do?
questions.explanation: スピーチコンテストの練習を聞いてほしいと頼んでいます。
highlights: Could you please listen to my speech?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「スピーチを聞く」→正解。選択肢2「スピーチを書く」→聞く。選択肢3「コンテストに出る」→聞く。選択肢4「英語を教える」→聞く。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Claudia. It's Doug. You sound tired.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I just got home. I've been working hard all day. And I still have to make myself dinner.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Well, why don't you come with me to a restaurant tonight instead?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That would be great.

questions.question: What will Claudia probably do tonight?
questions.explanation: Dougとレストランで食事をする予定です。
highlights: why don't you come with me to a restaurant
That would be great
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「Dougと外食」→正解。選択肢2「家で料理」→レストラン。選択肢3「早く寝る」→外食。選択肢4「残業」→もう帰宅。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Mei is from China, and she enjoys learning languages. She goes to college in Japan right now and her Japanese is very good. In fact, she won first prize in a Japanese speech contest last month. She is also studying English because she wants to go to Australia after she graduates next year.

questions.question: What is one thing that we learn about Mei?
choices: She won a Japanese speech contest.
questions.explanation: 先月日本語スピーチコンテストで優勝しました。
highlights: she won first prize in a Japanese speech contest last month
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「スピーチコンテスト優勝」→正解。選択肢2「オーストラリア出身」→中国。選択肢3「語学嫌い」→好き。選択肢4「卒業した」→来年。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Theresa enjoys spending time with her father. Their favorite sport is soccer, and on weekends they often watch soccer at home on TV. Usually, her father cooks a lot of food to eat during the games. The final game of the season is next week, and Theresa and her father are looking forward to it.

questions.question: What does Theresa like doing on weekends?
choices: Watching soccer on TV with her father.
questions.explanation: 週末にお父さんとテレビでサッカーを見るのが好きです。
highlights: on weekends they often watch soccer at home on TV
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「友達とサッカー」→テレビで観戦。選択肢2「父とテレビでサッカー」→正解。選択肢3「料理」→父が料理。選択肢4「試合に行く」→家でテレビ。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: OK, everyone. Let's begin this evening's basic computer skills class. In last week's class, we learned how to use the keyboard and mouse, and how to find files. Today, I'm going to show you how to send e-mails to your friends and family. First, please turn on your computers.

questions.question: What will the students learn today?
questions.explanation: 今日はメールの送り方を学びます。
highlights: I'm going to show you how to send e-mails
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「キーボードの使い方」→先週。選択肢2「ファイルの探し方」→先週。選択肢3「ウェブサイト作り」→メール。選択肢4「メールの送り方」→正解。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Owen goes to the aquarium with his grandmother when she visits him every winter. His favorite animal is the penguin. He loves to watch the penguins swimming in the water and eating fish. In the summer, Owen and his friends often go to a swimming pool, and Owen likes to imagine that he is a penguin swimming in the water.

questions.question: What does Owen do with his grandmother in the winter?
questions.explanation: 冬に祖母と水族館に行きます。
highlights: Owen goes to the aquarium with his grandmother
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「泳ぎに行く」→夏に友達と。選択肢2「映画」→水族館。選択肢3「買い物」→水族館。選択肢4「水族館に行く」→正解。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Last month, Mario watched a movie with his friend. The movie was about members of a college cycling club who worked together to win a bicycle race. Mario liked the movie so much that he joined a bicycle club at his high school. He bought a bicycle from a store, and now he rides it every day.

questions.question: How did Mario become interested in cycling?
choices: His friend invited him to a club.
He won a bicycle in a contest.
He watched a movie about cycling.
His parents bought him a bicycle.
questions.explanation: 自転車レースの映画を見て感動して自転車部に入りました。
highlights: Mario liked the movie so much that he joined a bicycle club
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「友達に誘われた」→映画。選択肢2「コンテストで自転車を獲得」→映画。選択肢3「自転車の映画を見た」→正解。選択肢4「親が買った」→自分で買った。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The famous king Alexander the Great had a beautiful black horse. It is said that the horse loved Alexander very much. In fact, many stories say that the horse would not allow anyone to ride it except for the king himself. Alexander rode his horse in many battles, and it became one of the most famous horses in history.

questions.question: What do many stories say about the horse of Alexander the Great?
choices: It was a gift from another king.
It was the fastest horse ever.
It was white with black spots.
questions.explanation: 王以外は誰も乗ることを許さなかったと言われています。
highlights: the horse would not allow anyone to ride it except for the king himself
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「別の王からの贈り物」→乗れるのは王だけ。選択肢2「アレクサンダーだけが乗れた」→正解。選択肢3「最速の馬」→王だけ。選択肢4「白と黒」→黒い馬。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: For Richard's 17th birthday last week, he got $200 from his grandparents. They gave him money because he said he wanted to buy a new smartphone. Yesterday, Richard went to an electronics store to buy one, but the phone he wanted actually cost $400. Richard has decided to get a part-time job and save money to buy it.

questions.question: Why has Richard decided to get a part-time job?
choices: He wants to buy a gift for his grandparents.
He wants to buy a new computer.
He needs more money for a smartphone.
questions.explanation: 欲しいスマホが400ドルで200ドルでは足りないのでアルバイトします。
highlights: the phone he wanted actually cost $400
decided to get a part-time job and save money
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「祖父母へのプレゼント」→スマホ。選択肢2「大学の費用」→スマホ。選択肢3「パソコン」→スマホ。選択肢4「スマホのお金が足りない」→正解。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Attention, students. The weather will be very hot this week, so here are some ways to stay cool. First, please bring a bottle of water to school. Also, you may use paper fans in class. And finally, you may also wear your gym clothes instead of your regular school uniform. These things should help you stay cooler.

questions.question: What is one way that students are told to stay cool?
questions.explanation: 制服の代わりに体操服を着てもいいと言われています。
highlights: you may also wear your gym clothes instead of your regular school uniform
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「学校を休む」→体操服。選択肢2「エアコン」→体操服。選択肢3「体操服を着られる」→正解。選択肢4「外で勉強」→体操服。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Yesterday, William and his wife decided to eat dinner at a new Italian restaurant in their town. William had lasagna, and his wife ate pizza. The food was good, and the staff members were very nice, so William and his wife wanted to tell other people about it. After they got home last night, they wrote a good review of the restaurant online.

questions.question: What did William and his wife do after they got home?
questions.explanation: 帰宅後にオンラインでレストランの良いレビューを書きました。
highlights: they wrote a good review of the restaurant online
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「イタリア料理を作った」→レビュー。選択肢2「レストランに電話」→レビュー。選択肢3「オンラインレビューを書いた」→正解。選択肢4「友達を招待」→レビュー。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A kind of whale called a narwhal lives in very cold oceans. Most male narwhals have a long tooth that comes out of their mouths. The tooth can be over two meters long. Some scientists think narwhals use this tooth to check the temperature. Others say that narwhals use it to help them find food. Scientists hope to learn more about narwhals.

questions.question: What is one thing that we learn about most male narwhals?
questions.explanation: 口から出る2メートル以上の長い歯を持っています。
highlights: Most male narwhals have a long tooth
The tooth can be over two meters long
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「長い歯がある」→正解。選択肢2「暖かい海に住む」→冷たい海。選択肢3「とても小さい」→大きな歯。選択肢4「他のクジラを食べる」→記載なし。
